{{Quote|The Emperor is gone. Everyone who held him dear needs to rally together to keep the Empire alive.|Ivak|<ref name="Mara">[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 3|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 3]]</ref>}}
'''Ivak''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] at the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. He was one of the agents assigned by [[Ysanne Isard]] to interrogate the arrested [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]; it was Ivak's stupidity that allowed Jade to escape. He was the superior to [[Tal Burren]].

==Appearances==
*[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 3|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 3]] {{1st}}
